summary: This source is an abstract and citation list for a 1998 co-authored study (including Julie E. Buring) from the Physicians' Health Study. It concludes that low-dose aspirin showed no association with colorectal cancer incidence over 12 years, though it notes the low dose and short treatment period might explain the null findings. Because the text is a multi-author abstract and citation index, it does not contain Buring's individual quotes, distinct frameworks, or personal thought processes.
